title: draba aizoides subsp. zahlbruckneri
intro: Draba aizoides subsp. zahlbruckneri, a subspecies of the Draba aizoides plant, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Draba aizoides subsp. zahlbruckneri is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a tincture or powder, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
